raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wisch ne buhß ſkummigß
nedß* baißigß/ ſamehr wiſch to
Teeſu wirß Semmes irr eezeß-
ließ/ un tahß Gallag zerrehß uß
winna Banſlibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta ſakka Deewß tah
KUNGS/ kas tahß Debbeſiß
radriß/ un tahß iſplattiß/ kas
to Semmi irr iſſtaiptiß/ ar to/
kas no tahß iſaung/ kas to Dwa-
fchu dohd teem Laudim/ kas ue
to irr/ un to Garru teem / kas
wirß to ſtaiga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es tah KUNGS eſmu
tew aizinaigß ar Taifnibu / un
fatwerſchu tewi pee tawag Rob-
kaß/ un pafargagſchu tewi. Un
eezeſſchu tewi par Derribu teem
Laudim/ par weenu Gaifchuma
to Pagann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka tu atwerr tahß Azziß
to Aklu/ un tohs Saistitus iſ-
wed no Zeetuma/ un no ta Zee-
tuma Mamma tohs/ kas Tuun-
ſiba ſehſch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſmu tah KUNGS/
tah irr mans Wahrdß/ un man-
nu Gohdu eß zittam ne dohfchu/
nedß mannu Slawu teem El-
keim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Redſt / tahß papreeſſch-
ſtuddinataß Leetas irr naheu-
ſchaß/ un tahß jaunas ſtahſtu
eß/ pirins tahß iſplaukſt/ leeſu
ß jauns tahß dſirdeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Vseebast rah Ki-
GAM weenn jaunu Dſeefin
wienna Glawn no Semmes G
leem. Juhs/ kas juhs pahr Ju-
en zelkateeß/ un kas eekſch ta-
irr/ juhs Gallag un winnu G
dſhwotaji.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lai ta Tuſſnefe un w
nas Piſſfahti to Balſi paz-
ar teem Zeemeem/ kur Reed-
dſhwo/ lai gawile/ kas Afu-
na-Kalnds dſhwo/ lai tee bre-
no to Kalnu Wirß Gallein.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lai tee tam KUNGA
Gohdu dohd / nn paſluddi-
winna Glawn Gallag.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS iſees
weens Warrenajß/ wiſch u
mohdinahß jawu karstu D
moſchann ka Karra-Wih-
wiſch gawileß/ un darrihß l
in Trohktnt/ tawug Eenaiducee-
wiſch pahrwarrehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es eſmu jenn Laika fu
fu zeetiß/ es eſmu kluſſu biſts
fawaldtjeeß. Bet nu brehſi-
es ka weena Seewa/ kas dſe-
de/ es pohſtiſchu un aprithſa-
tohß kobpa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es pohſtiſchu Kalnuß
Pakainus / un wiſſu win-
Saknum uſſhu eß ſakalſt/
darriſchu tahß Uppes par S
lahm/ un ieſchahweſchu tohs
faruś.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es waddiſchu ta
Aktus uß weenu Zeltu/ fo tee
irr ſunnaiſchi / es liſſhu te-
ſtaigahß uß Zetteem/ fo tee ue
paſinnuſchi/es darriſchu to Tn
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
